org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.actionmode

Class DifferedMouseEvent

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.actionmode.DifferedMouseEvent

  • public class DifferedMouseEvent
extends Object
    This object contains all the data that are corresponding to a mouse event for which the treatment was differed.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:09
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-swingpanel

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      ActionPointerEvent pointerEvent
      Mouse pressed event.
      Figure pressedFigure
      Figure under the mouse when the button was pressed.
      float x
      x position of the mouse.
      float y
      y position of the mouse.
